mapper.select:
SELECT pathway_id AS pathwayId, name, source, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pathway_target_rel ptr WHERE ptr.pathway_id = p.pathway_id) AS targetCount FROM pathways p
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pathway_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY pathway_id
SELECT id, pathway_id AS pathwayId, name, source, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM pathways WHERE pathway_id = #{pathwayId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tcm_tar_id) FROM pathway_target_rel WHERE pathway_id = #{pathwayId}) AS targetCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ct.inchikey) FROM pathway_target_rel ptr INNER JOIN compound_target_rel ct ON ptr.tcm_tar_id = ct.tcm_tar_id WHERE ptr.pathway_id = #{pathwayId}) AS compoundCount, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hcr.tcm_herb_id) FROM pathway_target_rel ptr INNER JOIN compound_target_rel ct ON ptr.tcm_tar_id = ct.tcm_tar_id INNER JOIN herb_compound_rel hcr ON ct.inchikey = hcr.inchikey WHERE ptr.pathway_id = #{pathwayId}) AS herbCount
